---
title: "Talks"
---

## Talks

**Chapel Hill**   Conference on Extreme Value Analysis – Chapel Hill, USA

   *2025*

   [Website](https://eva2025.unc.edu/){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
   [Slides](slides/scheffel_eva_2025.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

**Dresden**

   German Probability and Statistics Days – Dresden, Germany

   *2025*

   [Slides](slides/scheffel_gpsd_2025.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

 **Online**

   ECOSTA – online

   *2025*

   Extending Brown-Resnick stationarity to the max-domain of attraction

   [Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/EcoSta2025/index.php){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
   [Slides](slides/scheffel_ecosta_2025.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

 **Bochum**

   SPP 2265 Workshop: Geometric extreme value theory – Bochum, Germany

   *2024*

   Extending Brown-Resnick Stationarity to Maximum Domain of Attraction

   [Website](https://sites.google.com/view/geometric-extremes-bochum/home){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}

 **Berlin**

   CMStatistics – Berlin, Germany

   *2023*

   Long range dependence in extreme value analysis

   [Website](https://www.cmstatistics.org/CMStatistics2023/index.php){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
   [Slides](slides/cmstatistics2023.pdf){.talk-btn target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
